description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build and test that runs on push to master and dev branches and on pull requests to those branches, excluding markdown files. The workflow has two jobs: one for building and testing on Linux with a matrix of GCC and Clang compilers, and another for building on Windows. The Linux job installs dependencies, configures CMake, builds, and tests the program, while the Windows job installs dependencies, sets up vcpkg, and builds the program.
